text.title: Gcp Cloud Run Serverless Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gcp-cloud-run-serverless methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: design-service
step.action: Decide concurrency, CPU, memory, min-instances; pick service vs job.
step.decision-gate: If long-running batch → STOP and use Cloud Run Jobs.

step.name: secrets
step.action: Mount secrets via Secret Manager; verify no secrets in image/env.

step.name: smoke
step.action: Run smoke tests; confirm cold start + steady-state latency.
